title: Big Globe Compat - ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
description: This datapack adds compatibility between ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village and Big Globe.
body:
This datapack adds all outpost and village structures from ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village
to the terrain generation for Big Globe. It also spaces villages farther apart so they're not right next to each other all the time.
